title: Verification And Codification
objective: Leave behind a stronger local method so larger thriller projects remain testable, explainable, and reusable.
storyQuestions: Which failure classes still escape local checks?
What should become a stable rule or checklist instead of a rediscovered instinct?
What parts of the workflow are still too implicit for another writer or agent to repeat?
baseAcceptanceChecks: The round leaves behind a reusable rule, template, or check.
The method can explain why a round mattered and what it changed.
